"'''Droid Trouble'''" is a short story written by [[Chuck Sperati]] that was originally published in [[Star Wars Adventure Journal 3|''Star Wars Adventure Journal'' 3]] by [[West End Games]] in [[August]] [[1994]] and was later archived online at [[Hyperspace: The Official Star Wars Fan Club|Hyperspace]] on [[July 22]], [[2005]].

==Plot summary==
An ambitious [[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]] [[Politics/Legends|politician]] evades [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] pursuit while trying to deliver an [[Astromech droid/Legends|astromech droid]] loaded with sensitive [[Imperial Military/Legends|Imperial military]] data to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebellion]]. His [[Starship/Legends|starship]] crashes into the [[Desert/Legends|deserts]] of [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]. Rather than help [[Tereb Ab'Lon|Tereb]], the unscrupulous [[Nim Bola]] steals his droid and drops the Bothan into the [[Sarlacc/Legends|Sarlacc]] pit.
